tickets.title: Deploy pipeline stuck on staging for checkout-service
tickets.body: Latest deploy to staging hangs at the 'run integration tests' step, no error output for 20+ minutes.

tickets.title: checkout-service deploy hung again
tickets.body: Same as last week — staging deploy for checkout-service froze on integration tests, had to manually cancel and retry.

tickets.title: Recommendations API returning 502s intermittently
tickets.body: About 3% of requests to /api/v2/recommendations are returning 502 Bad Gateway, no clear pattern.

tickets.title: Password reset email not arriving for some users
tickets.body: Handful of users on the streaming app report password reset emails never arrive; SES logs show delivery.

tickets.title: Can't log in after subscription renewal
tickets.body: User says login fails right after their annual subscription renewed; error is generic 'something went wrong'.

tickets.title: Staging deploy for checkout-service timing out (3rd time this week)
tickets.body: Deploy pipeline hangs again on integration test step. This is becoming a pattern.

tickets.title: Recommendations API 502 spike during peak hours
tickets.body: 502 rate on recommendations endpoint jumped to 8% between 7-9pm, correlates with traffic peak.

tickets.title: Another user can't log in post-renewal
tickets.body: Second report this week of login failure right after subscription renews.

tickets.title: Password reset emails delayed 10+ minutes
tickets.body: Several users report the reset email eventually arrives but takes over 10 minutes, causing them to think it failed.

tickets.title: Feature request: dark mode for kids profile screen
tickets.body: Parent requests a dark mode toggle for the kids profile picker screen.

tickets.title: checkout-service staging deploy hung — 4th occurrence
tickets.body: Same integration test hang. Team suspects a flaky test but hasn't had time to investigate — always urgent, never gets root-caused.

tickets.title: Recommendations API 502s continue
tickets.body: Still seeing intermittent 502s on recommendations endpoint. No RCA yet — deprioritized twice due to other fires.

tickets.title: Third login failure after renewal report this month
tickets.body: Pattern continuing — three separate users this month hit login failure immediately after their subscription auto-renews.

tickets.title: Can I get a bigger avatar image size option?
tickets.body: User wants larger profile avatar upload size limit.

tickets.title: SES bounce rate creeping up on transactional emails
tickets.body: SES dashboard shows bounce rate up from 0.3% to 1.1% over the last 2 weeks, mostly password reset and welcome emails.
